text:
Created attachment 171113
Proposed patch (since 416324 revision)

Patch to unbreak games/tuxpuck port.

- Bump PORTREVISION
- Unbreak fetch
- Add audio/libogg to library dependency
- Regenerate patches

The distfile is fetchable:
